patch.content:
## Asking Ziva’s Data Questions

Smart Q&A lets parents ask natural-language questions about their baby’s data. Phase 2 expanded to 22 intents with 24 dedicated handlers.

## How It Works

Queries parse into intent categories: lookback, pattern, planning, and comparison. Each intent maps to a handler that queries the relevant data store and formats a human-readable answer.

The system degrades gracefully — unmatched queries get an honest response rather than a guess.

## The Lockdown

At 2,011 lines, Design Principles v3 is the most exhaustive design document in the project. It locks down every visual and interaction pattern.

## The Hard Rules

Twelve non-negotiable rules (HR-1 through HR-12): No emojis. No inline styles. No inline onclick. No raw pixel values. No text-overflow ellipsis. Domain color system. Dark mode coverage. escHtml on all user-data. Multi-round QA after every build.

## Why It Matters

The design principles are the reason a solo developer can maintain a 55K-line codebase without it collapsing into inconsistency.

## Beyond Text Matching

The Search Bar Upgrade transformed search from a simple text filter into an intelligent query system. Three query modes — lookback, pattern, and planning — route queries to specialized handlers.

## Nutrient Intelligence Cards

Search results include nutrient intelligence cards when queries touch diet data.

## The Ingredient Picker

A typeahead component that knows every food Ziva has ever eaten, ranked by frequency. Fast because it indexes on first load and filters in memory.
